bench_setup.notes: USART1 + DMA2 loopback test. PA9 (TX AF7) → PA10 (RX AF7), 115200 8N1. TX via DMA2 Stream7 Ch4; RX via DMA2 Stream2 Ch4. Sends 8 bytes {0xA1..0x34}, verifies echo via DMA RX buffer. On FAIL: error_code bit0=ERR_RX_TIMEOUT, bit1=ERR_DATA_MISMATCH. detail0=matched byte count. On PASS: detail0=heartbeat.

peripheral_signals.notes: USART1_TX AF7, driven by DMA2 Stream7 Ch4. Wire: PA9 → PA10.
USART1_RX AF7, captured by DMA2 Stream2 Ch4. Wire: PA9 → PA10.
